metadata.description: Structured plan-first development plugin for Claude Code with .flow/ task tracking, Agent Teams, and Ralph autonomous mode

plugins.name: flow-code
plugins.description: Zero-dependency planning + execution with .flow/ task tracking. Full-auto by default — zero questions, AI decides from context. Teams auto-parallel with file locking, runtime DAG mutation, auto draft-PR. PreCompact state preservation. 20 subagents, 25+ CLI commands, 23 skills.
